description: Crafted from genuine leather, this wallet from wac by wrangler is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. wac has elegantly combined classic techniques and innovative designs so you can carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet. Dimensions: 11 cm x 9 cm Textured black upper with stitch detail and embossed branding Has two main compartments Four card slots on either side of the wallet Two slip pockets on either side Care Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
